_doc: Faithful replay: ConnectorTriggerActivity faults with UiPath.Ipc.RemoteException wrapping 'Could not obtain access token. (invalid_grant)'. The operative signal is the unwrapped inner message (OAuth token cannot refresh). Signature mined verbatim from telemetry. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the RemoteException wrapping 'Could not obtain access token. (invalid_grant)' and the ConnectorTriggerActivity stack frame.
OPTIONAL — agent may ping the connection to corroborate the auth failure, but the unwrapped inner message already names the cause. min:0 means tracked-but-not-required.
